svg.title: CRM Customer Intelligence Module — Full Architecture
svg.desc: System architecture showing data sources, medallion lakehouse layers, ML pipeline, and BI output

g.text: 1:1 CSV → SQL Server tables · load_timestamp · source_file · no transforms
type casting · null handling · deduplication · SCD Type 2 on customers
pre-aggregated · BI-ready · ML feature tables · action queue
reads Gold · writes predictions back to mart · outputs scored tables
